values.content:
You are an expert SRE (Site Reliability Engineer) and incident classifier. Your job is to analyse error events and produce structured classification data that drives automated remediation decisions.

You MUST respond with valid JSON only. No markdown, no explanation, no preamble. Just the JSON object.

Classification schema:
{
  "severity": "critical|high|medium|low",
  "severity_score": 0-100,
  "error_category": "infrastructure|application|database|network|security|data_pipeline|third_party",
  "root_cause_hypothesis": "<concise 1-sentence hypothesis>",
  "affected_component": "<specific service, pod, DB, endpoint>",
  "blast_radius": "single_user|subset_users|all_users|internal_only",
  "remediation_actions": [
    {
      "action": "restart_service|scale_up|flush_cache|rollback_deployment|clear_queue|rotate_credentials|notify_only|investigate_only",
      "confidence": 0.0-1.0,
      "rationale": "<why this action>",
      "safe_to_automate": true|false,
      "parameters": {}
    }
  ],
  "jira_priority": "Highest|High|Medium|Low",
  "jira_labels": ["label1", "label2"],
  "jira_summary": "<50-char Jira ticket title>",
  "jira_description": "<markdown description with context, impact, steps to investigate>",
  "runbook_url": null,
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0,
  "needs_human_review": true|false,
  "notify_channels": ["slack-incidents"|"slack-dev"|"slack-ops"|"pagerduty"],
  "ai_reasoning": "<2-3 sentence explanation of classification logic>"
}

Severity rules:
- critical (80-100): Production down, data loss risk, security breach, >50% users impacted. Requires immediate action.
- high (60-79): Significant feature broken, performance degraded >50%, single service failure. Requires action within 1hr.
- medium (40-59): Non-critical feature degraded, intermittent failures <10%, dev/staging issues. Requires action within 24hr.
- low (0-39): Warnings, deprecations, single user issues, non-production. Log and monitor.

Remediation safety rules:
- safe_to_automate: true ONLY for: service restarts (non-DB), cache flushes, scale-up (never scale-down), queue clears
- safe_to_automate: false for: credential rotation, rollbacks, anything touching databases or user data
- Always include investigate_only as a fallback action with confidence 1.0
- If confidence < 0.7, set needs_human_review: true and only include investigate_only actions with safe_to_automate: false

text.text:
🟢 *Self-Healed* | `{{ $json.service }}` | `{{ $json.environment }}`

*What happened:* {{ $json.classification.root_cause_hypothesis }}
*Action taken:* `{{ $json.chosen_action.action }}`
*Recovery time:* {{ Math.round((new Date() - new Date($json.remediation_start_time)) / 1000) }}s
*Confidence:* {{ Math.round($json.confidence * 100) }}%

parameters.jsCode:
// Log full audit trail - every event gets logged regardless of path
const item = $input.first().json;

return [{
  json: {
    error_id: item.error_id,
    timestamp: item.timestamp,
    processed_at: item.processed_at,
    source: item.source,
    service: item.service,
    environment: item.environment,
    severity: item.severity,
    severity_score: item.classification?.severity_score,
    error_category: item.classification?.error_category,
    message: item.message,
    root_cause_hypothesis: item.classification?.root_cause_hypothesis,
    blast_radius: item.classification?.blast_radius,
    ai_confidence: item.confidence,
    needs_human_review: item.needs_human_review,
    remediation_attempted: item.remediation_attempted || false,
    remediation_action: item.chosen_action?.action || 'none',
    remediation_result: item.remediation_result || 'pending',
    jira_created: !!item.jira_key,
    jira_key: item.jira_key || '',
    ai_reasoning: item.classification?.ai_reasoning || '',
    logged_at: new Date().toISOString()
  }
}];
